services.pageSubtitle: Pick the package that matches your stage. EU data residency by default. EUR pricing only — TJM is set during scoping, not on this page.
services.euDataResidency: All client systems we operate or build run inside EU-jurisdiction data centers (Frankfurt, Paris, Amsterdam) by default. Custom regional residency on request.

maintenance.name: Maintenance
maintenance.pitch: Keep an existing platform alive, secure, and quietly improving.
deliverables: Security patches, dependency updates, uptime monitoring
Bug triage and small enhancements within retainer hours
Monthly health report (perf, errors, dependency drift)
Direct line to the engineer on Telegram or Slack
maintenance.fitFor: Teams with a working product but no in-house engineer to babysit it.

audit.name: Audit
audit.pitch: Independent technical review of an existing system before a hire, raise, or rebuild.
deliverables: Architecture, performance, security, and operability assessment
Risk register prioritized by blast radius and effort
Concrete remediation roadmap with effort estimates
audit.fitFor: Founders, CTOs, and investors who need an honest second opinion.

build.name: Build
build.pitch: Design, build and launch a new product surface end-to-end.
deliverables: Discovery, technical design, and milestone plan
Implementation in Laravel / Next.js / TypeScript stack
Bilingual EN/FR support, EU data residency, CI/CD
build.fitFor: Companies launching a new product or rebuilding a legacy surface.

partner.title: Partner with us
partner.subtitle: Overflow capacity for boutique agencies
partner.body: If you're a 5–20 person agency in Paris, Brussels or Tokyo and you've outgrown your delivery bench, we run dedicated PTR squads under your brand. EU contracts, your client owns the IP, transparent rate cards.
partner.cta: Talk to us about a partnership

about.pageTitle: PTR Niger — nine years of building software that ships
about.intro: We are a senior software studio of 10+ engineers who have shipped Laravel, Next.js, Vue and Symfony platforms across logistics, EdTech, sport-tech, real estate and recruitment for clients in Niger, France, Belgium and Japan.
about.differentiator: Bilingual EN+FR delivery, EU data residency by default, and one engagement composition: senior people doing the work, no offshore handoffs.
about.composition: Every engagement runs with a senior tech lead and a delivery counterpart. We don't disclose individual names on the public site by default — the work, the metrics, and the contracts speak for the team.
about.stackBlurb: TypeScript (advanced patterns), Laravel + PHPUnit, Symfony, Next.js, React, Vue, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, REST + GraphQL, Stripe, Vercel + AWS + DigitalOcean. Test stack: Jest, Vitest, Playwright. AI APIs (Claude / OpenAI) for production features.
about.euDataResidency: Client data and operational systems run on EU-jurisdiction infrastructure by default.

ack.title: Brief received
ack.body: We've logged your brief and will reply within 4 business hours (Mon–Fri, 10am–7pm WAT).

errors.generic: Something went wrong sending your brief. Please email us instead.
errors.rateLimit: Too many submissions from this network. Try again in an hour or email us directly.

cookies.title: We respect your privacy
cookies.body: We use Umami (self-hosted, cookieless analytics) to count anonymous page views. Calendly and the contact form set short-lived cookies only when you interact with them. Nothing is shared with ad networks.
